{{Infobox character
| name = the stranger (Cradle)
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The stranger is a young man with a [[Remnant prosthetic]] right arm made of white light.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The stranger wears a pin with a green cloud emblem of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The stranger's [[madra]] is described as being like a pure, untainted spring.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
